title: Invoice
liveNote: This invoice reflects the job card's current estimate — extra authorised work updates it under the same number until it's paid.
paidLocked: This invoice is paid and locked. Only an admin can unlock it for corrections.
unlockConfirm: Unlock this paid invoice for corrections? The action is recorded in the audit trail, and the invoice must be marked paid again afterwards.

email.subject: Invoice {{number}} from {{garage}}
email.body: Please find attached invoice {{number}} from {{garage}} for {{total}}.
